metadata.description: Security bootstrapper for Claude Code projects

plugins.name: save-yourself
plugins.description: One-command security bootstrapper. Hardens .env handling, scans for credential leaks and hardcoded secrets, audits dependencies (Node, Go, Rust, Python, Java), installs a gitleaks pre-commit hook (Guardian Mode), wires up Claude Code real-time secret scanning, and optionally generates a GitHub Actions CI workflow and CLAUDE.md security status block.
